This black folding chair features a sturdy metal frame and a comfortable molded seat with a supportive backrest. Designed for durability and easy setup, it is lightweight, foldable, and simple to transport and store. This folding bamboo chair features a natural wood finish with a comfortably curved back and sturdy support braces for added stability. Designed for both style and function, it offers reliable seating with a lightweight, foldable design for easy setup and storage. Perfect for outdoor ceremonies, beach weddings, rustic events, and boho-themed celebrations, this chair adds warmth and charm to any event setting. Price: $30 per day
